goal: Create a small static shopping website MVP that a user can review as a generated output package.
strategy: Use a bounded meeting, then generate four explicit files with deterministic verification. This is a common generated-output demo, not a dashboard-specific or shopping-only architecture.

goal_plan.goal: Create a small static shopping website MVP that a user can review as a generated output package.

jobs.title: Create shopping page shell
jobs.instruction: Create shopping-site/index.html for a static shopping website MVP. It must link styles.css and app.js, show a clear product grid, include at least four products with prices and add-to-cart controls, include cart count and total placeholders, and include a checkout button clearly marked as a demo/stub. Keep it dependency-free and reviewable by opening index.html.
evidence_requirements: file path and main UI elements created
jobs.success_check: index.html exists and describes the product grid, cart placeholders, and checkout stub.

jobs.title: Style shopping page
jobs.instruction: Create shopping-site/styles.css for the static shopping website. Style a clean product grid, product cards, cart area, buttons, and responsive layout. Do not use external dependencies or remote assets.
jobs.success_check: styles.css exists and styles the generated site.

jobs.title: Implement cart interaction
jobs.instruction: Create shopping-site/app.js for the static shopping website. Implement add-to-cart behavior, cart count updates, total price calculation, and a checkout stub that explicitly says no real payment is processed. Use plain JavaScript only.
evidence_requirements: add-to-cart, count update, total update, checkout stub
jobs.success_check: app.js exists and implements cart behavior without real payment processing.

jobs.title: Write review instructions
jobs.instruction: Create shopping-site/README.md explaining what was generated, how to review it locally by opening index.html, what files are included, and limitations. Make clear this is a static demo with no real checkout or payment processing.
evidence_requirements: generated file list and review instructions
jobs.success_check: README.md exists and tells a user how to inspect the generated output package.

jobs.title: Summarize generated output package
jobs.instruction: Create summary.md with 3 short bullets and one short takeaway sentence. Summarize the generated shopping-site package, list the main deliverables, state that verification checks static files and cart behavior, and mention the limitation that checkout is a stub with no real payment processing.
evidence_requirements: generated file list, verification scope, and checkout limitation
jobs.success_check: summary.md gives a concise human-readable result for the dashboard.
